# UX / Maze Design Skill

Purpose: Produce maze layouts, sprite metadata, animation timing, accessibility guidance, and arXiv listing layout suggestions.

Capabilities:
- Generate multiple maze layout variants with descriptions.
- Specify sprite sheet dimensions, frames, and suggested filenames.
- Provide animation FPS and frame counts, plus hitbox sizing guidance.
- Produce responsive arXiv list/card layouts and readability recommendations.

Inputs: feature requirements, visual constraints.
Outputs: `Maze variants`, `Sprites`, `Animations`, `ArXiv layout`, and `Accessibility` sections in markdown.
